description: A Computer Network Architect is integrating an Operational Technology (OT) network. Read the ICS specification document at ~/Desktop/ot_device_specs.txt. Create two new Device Categories ('Industrial-PLC' and 'HVAC-Sensor'), two new Vendors ('Siemens' and 'Schneider-Electric'), and two new Device Templates ('Siemens-S7-1500' mapped to 'Siemens'/'Industrial-PLC' with System OID '.1.3.6.1.4.1.4329.1.1', and 'Schneider-HVAC-Monitor' mapped to 'Schneider-Electric'/'HVAC-Sensor' with System OID '.1.3.6.1.4.1.3833.1.2'). Use OpManager at http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
